items.title: Prestianni banned for anti-gay slur to Vini Jr.
items.summary: UEFA on Friday handed Benfica's Gianluca Prestianni a six-match ban for anti-gay conduct towards Real Madrid's Vinícius Júnior during their Champions League match in February.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Alcaraz (wrist) won't defend French Open title
items.summary: Two-time defending French Open champion Carlos Alcaraz won't attempt to defend his title due to a wrist injury.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup Ultimate Fanbase! Spain vs. Argentina in the Semifinals
items.summary: Which World Cup fanbase will be the loudest? The most fun? The most passionate? Vote in our 2026 FIFA World Cup Ultimate Fanbase.
